name: Monster Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs Peanut butter, divided into 3 cups and about 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs, vanilla extract, corn syrup, softened butter, brown sugar, white sugar, baking soda, peanut butter (3 cups), and 1 cup of oatmeal.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (chocolate chips and candy M&Ms) until well combined.
3. Using a teaspoon, form small balls of dough and roll them in powdered sugar.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Flatten each ball slightly with a fork.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Note: This recipe does not require flour; all the necessary ingredients are included in the mix.
